UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the Study Zone application, storing personal preferences and progress.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for identification (assuming authentication is handled externally).

currentClassId.description: Reference to the Class entity representing the user's currently selected or enrolled class for personalized content. (Relationship: Class 1:N UserProfile)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: Represents an academic class level, such as Class 9, Class 10, etc.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Class entity.

gradeLevel.description: The numerical grade level of the class (e.g., 9, 10, 11, 12).

Subject.title: Subject
Subject.description: Represents an academic subject taught within a specific class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Subject entity.

classId.description: Reference to the Class entity this subject belongs to. (Relationship: Class 1:N Subject)

Chapter.title: Chapter
Chapter.description: Represents a specific chapter or topic within a subject.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Chapter entity.

name.description: The name of the chapter (e.g., 'Chemical Reactions and Equations').

subjectId.description: Reference to the Subject entity this chapter belongs to. (Relationship: Subject 1:N Chapter)

classId.description: Reference to the Class entity this chapter indirectly belongs to (via Subject). (Relationship: Class 1:N Chapter)

StudyMaterial.title: StudyMaterial
StudyMaterial.description: Represents general study materials like NCERT notes, important questions, PYQs, and sample papers for CBSE classes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyMaterial entity.

title.description: The title of the study material (e.g., 'Chapter 1 Notes: Science', 'Class 10 PYQs').

description.description: A brief description of the study material.

fileUrl.description: URL to the downloadable PDF or resource file.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail image for displaying the material in a card-based layout.

classId.description: Reference to the Class entity this material is primarily for. (Relationship: Class 1:N StudyMaterial)

subjectId.description: Reference to the Subject entity this material belongs to. (Relationship: Subject 1:N StudyMaterial)

chapterId.description: Optional reference to the Chapter entity this material covers, if chapter-specific. (Relationship: Chapter 1:N StudyMaterial)

publishedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was published.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was last updated.

tags.description: An array of keywords or tags for search and categorization (e.g., 'CBSE', 'PDF', 'Science').

CompetitiveExam.title: CompetitiveExam
CompetitiveExam.description: Represents competitive examinations like JEE or NEET.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CompetitiveExam entity.

name.description: The full name of the competitive exam (e.g., 'JEE Main + Advanced', 'NEET UG').

shortName.description: A shorter, common name or acronym for the exam (e.g., 'JEE', 'NEET').

description.description: A brief description of the competitive exam.

CompetitiveExamMaterial.title: CompetitiveExamMaterial
CompetitiveExamMaterial.description: Represents study materials specifically for competitive exams like JEE and NEET, including notes, PYQs, formula sheets, and mock tests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CompetitiveExamMaterial entity.

title.description: The title of the competitive exam material (e.g., 'JEE Physics PYQs 2013-2023').

description.description: A brief description of the competitive exam material.

materialType.description: The type of competitive exam material.

fileUrl.description: URL to the downloadable PDF or resource file.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail image for displaying the material in a card-based layout.

competitiveExamId.description: Reference to the CompetitiveExam entity this material is for. (Relationship: CompetitiveExam 1:N CompetitiveExamMaterial)

subjectId.description: Optional reference to the Subject entity this material is for, if subject-specific. (Relationship: Subject 1:N CompetitiveExamMaterial)

chapterId.description: Optional reference to the Chapter entity this material covers, if chapter-specific. (Relationship: Chapter 1:N CompetitiveExamMaterial)

publishedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was published.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was last updated.

tags.description: An array of keywords or tags for search and categorization (e.g., 'JEE', 'Physics', 'Mock Test').

Quiz.title: Quiz
Quiz.description: Represents an interactive quiz with a set of questions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Quiz entity.

title.description: The title of the quiz (e.g., 'Chapter 1 Science Quiz').

description.description: A brief description or instructions for the quiz.

durationMinutes.description: The recommended duration for completing the quiz in minutes.

totalQuestions.description: The total number of questions included in the quiz.

classId.description: Optional reference to the Class entity this quiz is relevant to. (Relationship: Class 1:N Quiz)

subjectId.description: Optional reference to the Subject entity this quiz is relevant to. (Relationship: Subject 1:N Quiz)

chapterId.description: Optional reference to the Chapter entity this quiz is based on. (Relationship: Chapter 1:N Quiz)

competitiveExamId.description: Optional reference to the CompetitiveExam entity this quiz is for. (Relationship: CompetitiveExam 1:N Quiz)

difficultyLevel.description: The perceived difficulty level of the quiz (e.g., 'Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the quiz was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the quiz was last updated.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents an individual question, typically part of a quiz or an interactive question bank.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Question entity.

quizId.description: Reference to the Quiz entity this question belongs to. (Relationship: Quiz 1:N Question)

questionText.description: The full text of the question.

options.description: An array of possible answer options for multiple-choice questions.

correctOptionIndex.description: The 0-based index of the correct option in the 'options' array for multiple-choice questions.

answerExplanation.description: A detailed explanation for the correct answer.

questionType.description: The type of question (e.g., 'MCQ', 'Short Answer', 'Long Answer').

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image associated with the question.

difficultyLevel.description: The perceived difficulty level of the question (e.g., 'Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard').

UserSavedMaterial.title: UserSavedMaterial
UserSavedMaterial.description: Represents a user's saved study material or competitive exam material for quick access.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSavedMaterial entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who saved the material. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserSavedMaterial)

studyMaterialId.description: Optional reference to a StudyMaterial entity, if the saved material is a general study resource. (Relationship: StudyMaterial 1:N UserSavedMaterial) *Either this or `competitiveExamMaterialId` should be present.*

competitiveExamMaterialId.description: Optional reference to a CompetitiveExamMaterial entity, if the saved material is for competitive exams. (Relationship: CompetitiveExamMaterial 1:N UserSavedMaterial) *Either this or `studyMaterialId` should be present.*

savedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the material was saved by the user.

UserQuizAttempt.title: UserQuizAttempt
UserQuizAttempt.description: Records a user's attempt at a specific quiz, including their score and answers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserQuizAttempt entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who attempted the quiz. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserQuizAttempt)

quizId.description: Reference to the Quiz entity that was attempted. (Relationship: Quiz 1:N UserQuizAttempt)

startedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user started the quiz attempt.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user submitted the quiz attempt.

score.description: The raw score obtained by the user for this quiz attempt.

totalCorrectQuestions.description: The total number of questions answered correctly in this attempt.

totalQuestions.description: The total number of questions in the quiz during this attempt.

selectedOptions.description: An ordered array of numbers, where each number represents the 0-based index of the option chosen by the user for the corresponding question in the quiz.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID `{userId}` corresponds to Firebase Authentication's UID. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'id' matching the document ID for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Contains definitions for academic class levels (e.g., Class 9, Class 10). This is a public, read-only collection for all users, enabling easy navigation and filtering of related content.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for an academic class.

definition.description: Defines academic subjects (e.g., Science, Mathematics). Documents include `classId` for direct filtering and linking, supporting QAPs. This is a public, read-only collection for all users.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for an academic subject.

definition.description: Lists individual chapters or topics. Documents include `classId` and `subjectId` for direct filtering and navigation, supporting QAPs. This is a public, read-only collection for all users.

params.name: chapterId
params.description: The unique identifier for a chapter within a subject.

definition.description: Stores general study materials like notes, important questions, and sample papers. Includes `classId`, `subjectId`, and optional `chapterId` for denormalized authorization and efficient querying (QAPs). This collection is publicly readable.

params.name: studyMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a study material document.

definition.description: Contains definitions for competitive examinations (e.g., JEE, NEET). This is a public, read-only collection for all users, enabling navigation to related materials.

params.name: competitiveExamId
params.description: The unique identifier for a competitive examination.

definition.description: Stores study materials specifically for competitive exams. Includes `competitiveExamId`, optional `subjectId`, and `chapterId` for denormalized authorization and efficient querying (QAPs). This collection is publicly readable.

params.name: competitiveExamMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a competitive exam material document.

definition.description: Represents interactive quizzes. Includes optional `classId`, `subjectId`, `chapterId`, and `competitiveExamId` for denormalized authorization and efficient querying (QAPs). This collection is publicly readable.

params.name: quizId
params.description: The unique identifier for a quiz.

definition.description: Contains individual questions belonging to a specific quiz. Access is dependent on the parent `quizId`, implying public read access when the parent quiz is public. `quizId` is denormalized in the document itself for authorization independence.

params.name: quizId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent quiz.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a question within a quiz.

definition.description: Stores materials saved by a specific user. The `userId` in the path ensures authorization independence and restricts access to the owning user (`request.auth.uid`). `userId` is also denormalized within the document to simplify rules. Supports QAPs as users can only query their own saved items.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who saved the material.

params.name: userSavedMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a user's saved material entry.

definition.description: Records a user's attempt at a quiz. The `userId` in the path ensures authorization independence and restricts access to the owning user (`request.auth.uid`). `userId` and `quizId` are also denormalized within the document to simplify rules. Supports QAPs as users can only query their own quiz attempts.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who attempted the quiz.

params.name: userQuizAttemptId
params.description: The unique identifier for a user's quiz attempt.

firestore.reasoning: The proposed Firestore structure prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable authorization by adhering to the core design principles.
